description_long: This hospital is a large, multi-story structure with a modern architectural design, featuring a combination of rectangular and curved facades. The exterior is predominantly white and light gray, with horizontal green accent lines and large glass windows on the front, allowing natural light into the lobby area. The building includes a prominent main entrance with a covered drop-off area, and banners with Japanese text are visible on the front facade, suggesting its location in Japan. The rooftop houses several mechanical units and ventilation systems, while the rear and sides of the building are more utilitarian, with smaller windows and service entrances. The ground level is surrounded by a paved plaza, providing pedestrian access and space for vehicle drop-off. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and designed to accommodate high volumes of patients and staff.
description: A large, modern hospital with a white and gray exterior, green accents, and a glass-fronted main entrance. The building features multiple stories, rooftop mechanical units, and a spacious paved area at ground level.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a glass facade, banners, and a covered drop-off area, as well as landscaped elements inside the lobby.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the curved facade, horizontal green accent lines, and several large banners with Japanese text.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a more utilitarian side with smaller windows, service entrances, and less decorative detailing.
description_view_3: This view shows the opposite side, featuring additional windows, a secondary entrance, and rooftop mechanical structures.
